message:
test(screen): add 10 core resize and cold scrollback edge case tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Tests cover: dimensions change on grow/shrink, DPI update, cursor position
returned from resize, same-dimensions content preservation, grow adds visible
lines, cold scrollback worker zero/peak backlog, multiple resizes cache
integrity, and last-good-frame lifecycle capture count monotonicity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
